landing.title: Is today a workday?
landing.subtitle: Check any date against China's official holiday and makeup-workday calendar with a single API call.
landing.trust: ✓ 500 req/month free · ✓ No credit card · ✓ Instant access

features.holiday_desc: Official data source, covers all makeup workdays
features.endpoints_desc: Check a day · Range stats · Next workday
features.instant_desc: Sign up and get a key immediately

landing.cta_sub: Create a free account and get your API Key instantly.
landing.cta_note: 500 req/month free · No credit card · Upgrade anytime

docs.title: API Reference
docs.subtitle: isworkday.io provides a REST API for checking the workday status of any date on the Chinese calendar. All requests are HTTPS, responses are JSON.
docs.quick_start_sub: Three steps: create account → get API Key → make a request.
docs.auth_note: Free accounts get {limit} requests/month. Exceeded requests return
docs.auth_note2: status. Upgrade in the dashboard for unlimited access.
docs.check_sub: Check whether a specific date is a workday in a given country.
docs.range_sub: Get workday stats and per-day details for a date range. Maximum 366 days.
docs.next_sub: Find the Nth next workday after a given date. Useful for billing cycles, settlement dates, etc.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your API keys and monitor usage.
dashboard.keys_subtitle: Each key has its own monthly quota.
dashboard.new_key_warn: Copy and store this key now — it will only be shown once.
dashboard.banner_desc: Running low on free quota. Support us on Ko-fi to unlock unlimited requests.
dashboard.confirm_revoke: Are you sure you want to revoke this key? This cannot be undone.
